title: Architecture of a Typical Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)
description: A layered diagram showing the key components and data flow in a standard CNN architecture for image processing.
relationships: Raw pixel data flows from Input to Convolutional Layer
Feature maps are processed by an Activation Function for non-linearity
Output is reduced in spatial size by a Pooling Layer (subsampling)
This sequence (Conv->Activation->Pooling) repeats for feature hierarchy
Final feature maps are flattened and fed into a Fully Connected Layer for final classification
